title: quercus × walteriana
intro: Quercus × walteriana, also known as Walter's oak, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Quercus lyrata and Quercus coccinea, two oak tree species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Quercus × walteriana include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to extract its active compounds, which can be used to make herbal remedies for various ailments.
